projects.name: MiniFT
projects.summary: A minimalist finance tracker focused on helping users manage transactions, budgets, and financial habits through a clean interface and a production-minded architecture.

projects.name: AnimeSR
projects.summary: A web app that combines a FastAPI backend and a Next.js frontend to help users search anime, explore genres, browse highlights, open detailed views, and get related recommendations from a filtered public-safe catalog.

projects.name: Library API
projects.summary: A fullstack library management application. It includes a protected workspace, internal API routes, bilingual UI, persistent theme preferences, and Swagger-based API documentation.

image.alt: EasyToDo task and habit tracker interface

projects.name: EasyToDo
projects.summary: A local-first productivity app for managing tasks and habits with a minimal interface, fast interactions, and an intentionally distraction-free experience.

image.alt: EasyToDo task and habit tracker interface

externalProjects.name: Team Logistics
externalProjects.description: Global logistics operator based in the Dominican Republic, specialized in freight forwarding for importers and distributors.

externalProjects.name: Oxsis
externalProjects.description: Logistics and customs brokerage company based in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic, operating from Las Américas International Airport (AILA).
